name: reltio-ai-ready-howtos
description: Practical, hands-on guides for working with the Reltio platform — generated from [official Reltio documentation](https://docs.reltio.com) using AI assistance.

scripts.postinstall: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo '✓ Git hooks configured (.githooks/pre-commit will auto-generate HTML on commit)'
scripts.refresh-docs: curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/reltio-ai/reltio-ai-ready-docs/main/docs.md -o reltio-docs/docs.md && curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/reltio-ai/reltio-ai-ready-docs/main/index.md -o reltio-docs/index.md && echo '✓ Corpus refreshed from github.com/reltio-ai/reltio-ai-ready-docs'
